prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约59826名、59249名、159961名、89872名、104154名。2023年出现明显断档（位次大幅后移至约16万），2024年 迅速回弹至约9万，2025年继续后移至约10.4万，近两年呈持续后移趋势，2025年基准位次约104154名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年107人、2022年171 人、2023年213人、2024年351人、2025年386人，呈持续大幅扩招态势；2026年计划389人，较2025年仅增加3人，扩招幅度明显收窄至约0.78%，对竞争的缓解作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 宁夏大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第170名→2026年第137名，整体处于全国中上水平，在西部高校中综合实 力较强；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及图书馆管理类事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音学校热度排名第104位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量 较低；近年无投档线异常断档记录（2023年断档属录取结果而非声誉事件），报考心理层面无明显负面干扰；宁夏大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科 ，整体学科实力以B类为主，优势集中在草学、民族学、水利工程等特色领域，对山东考生的吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信 息/通信等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校招生专业（计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息工程等）匹配，对相关专业报考有一定拉动作用；山东省2026年高考报 名总人数约72万，较2025年约68.1万增加约5.7%，考生规模持续扩大，竞争压力上升；宁夏大学位于宁夏银川市，属于西部高校，在地域偏好上对山东考生吸引力一般；该校在山东省招生规模较大（2025年386人），是其在 省外的主要生源省份之一，招生依赖性较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划仅微扩0.78%而山东考生总数增长约5.7%导致供需矛盾加剧、 学校声誉中性无提振效应、抖音关注度一般等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准104154名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约104740名，区间104240–105240名。

- 计算机科学与技术（与中软国际共建项目）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间104240–105240名内的考生，建议以二档专业为主力选择（如电子信息工程、通信工程、经济学、金融学等），一档专业（法学、电气、计算机等）可作为冲刺目 标但录取概率较低，三档专业（农学、园艺、草业科学等）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如10万以内）可重点冲刺一档热门专业。宁夏大学无A类学科，专业选择上建议优 先考虑社会热度高的工科类（电气、计算机、电子信息）和经管类（会计、金融）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shandong Comprehensive category were approximately 59826, 59249, 159961, 89872, and 104154 respectively. In 2023, there was a clear gap (ranking significantly dropped to about 160,000), rebounded quickly to about 90,000 in 2024, and continued to drop to about 104,000 in 2025, showing a continuous downward trend in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of about 104154 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Shandong Comprehensive category was 107 in 2021, 171 in 2022, 213 in 2023, 351 in 2024, and 386 in 2025, showing a continuous significant expansion. The 2026 plan is 389, an increase of only 3 compared to 2025, with the expansion rate significantly narrowing to about 0.78%, which has limited effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science China University Ranking has been rising in recent years, from 170th in 2021 to 137th in 2026, overall at the upper-middle level nationwide, with strong comprehensive strength among western universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving library management incidents, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin school popularity ranking is 104th, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms. In recent years, there have been no abnormal admission cutoff ranking incidents (the 2023 gap was an admission result rather than a reputation event), with no obvious negative interference in the application psychology. Ningxia University has no A- or above level disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with overall discipline strength mainly at B level, with advantages in characteristic fields such as Grassland Science, Ethnology, and Water Conservancy Engineering, which have relatively limited appeal to Shandong candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended in social popularity, matching the university's enrollment majors (Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.), which has a certain pulling effect on applications for related majors. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% compared to about 681,000 in 2025, with the candidate scale continuing to expand and competition pressure rising. Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, belonging to western universities, with generally average appeal to Shandong candidates in terms of regional preference. The university has a large enrollment scale in Shandong Province (386 in 2025), making it one of its main source provinces outside the province, with high enrollment dependence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings in the past two years, the 2026 enrollment plan only slightly expanding by 0.78% while the total number of Shandong candidates increases by about 5.7%, leading to intensified supply-demand contradiction, the neutral reputation of the university with no boosting effect, and generally low Douyin attention, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to slightly drop from the 2025 baseline of 104154. The predicted minimum ranking is about 104740, with a range of 104240–105240.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 104240–105240 are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (such as Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Economics, Finance, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Law, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, etc.) as sprint targets but with lower admission probability, and Tier 3 majors (Agronomy, Horticulture, Grassland Science, etc.) as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 100,000) can focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors. Ningxia University has no A-level disciplines, so it is recommended to prioritize socially popular engineering majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Electronic Information) and economics/management majors (Accounting, Finance) when choosing majors.
